title: ophiorrhiza spathulata
intro: Ophiorrhiza spathulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "Mountain Barometer" due to its ability to thrive at high altitudes. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ophiorrhiza spathulata include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain and swelling, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or decoction form, with some practitioners also using it in tincture or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
